mandates.mandate: Each story is evaluated independently with per-story gate selection.
Code Review and Security Review are always present regardless of story type.
A single gate failure means the story does not clear review.
Gate substitution is determined by the story's traces_to requirement ID prefix.

standard-gates.gate: Verify code review artifact exists covering all changed files.
Verify unit/integration/e2e tests exist and pass.
Verify security review artifact exists (OWASP, dep scan, secrets).
Verify automated test coverage meets threshold.
Verify test quality review artifact exists.

infrastructure-gates.gate: Same workflow, IaC expertise expected (Terraform, CloudFormation, Pulumi).
terraform plan assertions replace automated test coverage.
OPA/Rego coverage replaces test quality review.
Cost analysis and autoscaling validation replace load testing.

step.title: Classify each story
step.action: Read traces_to field. Extract requirement ID prefix.
FR-/NFR- = application (standard gates). IR-/OR-/SR- = infrastructure (adapted gates).
Unrecognized prefix: default to application. Log warning.

step.title: Evaluate gates per story
step.action: For each story, evaluate all 6 gates from selected set. Record per-gate PASS/FAIL.

step.title: Aggregate results
step.action: All 6 gates must PASS per story. Return overall PASS or FAIL with details.
